# @peerlytics/sdk

Query ZKP2P P2P protocol data on Base: rates, orderbooks, maker portfolios, and live activity.

## SDK

Package: @peerlytics/sdk (npm)
Install: npm install @peerlytics/sdk

```ts
import { Peerlytics } from "@peerlytics/sdk";
const client = new Peerlytics({ apiKey: "pk_live_..." }); // required (each key includes 1000 free requests/month)
```

## Methods

Analytics:
- client.getProtocolSummary() - protocol MTD/QTD/YTD/all-time volume, liquidity, deposits
- client.getLeaderboard({ limit?, offset? }) - top makers/takers by volume, APR, profit
- client.getProtocolOverview(range) - full analytics overview for mtd, 3mtd, ytd, all

Market:
- client.getMarketSummary({ currency?, platform?, includeRates?, limit?, offset? }) - rate stats per pair
- client.getOrderbook({ currency?, platform?, minSize? }) - live orderbook by rate level

Explorer:
- client.getDeposit(id, { limit?, offset? }) - deposit detail with intents
- client.getDeposits({ depositor?, delegate?, platform?, currency?, status?, accepting?, limit?, offset? }) - query deposits
- client.getIntent(hash) - intent detail
- client.getIntents({ owner?, recipient?, verifier?, depositId?, status?, limit?, offset? }) - query intents
- client.getAddress(address, { limit?, offset? }) - address profile with stats
- client.getMaker(address) - maker portfolio with allocations and profit
- client.getVerifier(address, { limit?, offset? }) - verifier stats and breakdown
- client.getVault(id, { days? }) - vault detail with snapshots
- client.search(query, { type?, role?, limit?, offset? }) - multi-type search

Activity:
- client.getActivity({ type?, depositId?, address?, rateManagerId?, since?, limit?, offset? }) - live protocol events
- client.streamActivity({ type?, rateManagerId?, since?, intervalMs?, limit? }, { signal? }) - SSE real-time event stream (returns ReadableStream<LiveEvent>)

History:
- client.getMakerHistory(address) - maker historical stats
- client.getTakerHistory(address) - taker historical stats

Metadata:
- client.getCurrencies() - supported fiat currencies
- client.getPlatforms() - supported payment platforms

Vaults:
- client.getVaultsOverview() - all vaults with AUM, fees, snapshots
- client.getVault(id, { days? }) - vault detail with snapshots

Account:
- client.listKeys() - list API keys
- client.createKey(label?) - create key
- client.rotateKey(oldKey) - rotate key
- client.deleteKey(key) - delete key
- client.getCredits() - credit balance and packages
- client.createCheckout(pkg) - purchase credits (starter/growth/scale)

## Auth

1. API key: set PEERLYTICS_API_KEY env var or pass { apiKey: "pk_live_..." }. Each key includes 1000 free requests/month. Generate via peerlytics.xyz/developers or programmatically with client.createKey().
2. x402: pay per request with USDC on Base, no key needed

## Errors

```ts
import { PeerlyticsError, RateLimitError, NotFoundError, ValidationError } from "@peerlytics/sdk";
```

Types: ActivityStreamFilters, ActivityStreamEvent (for streamActivity)

## Examples in this repo

- volume-dashboard.ts: protocol stats terminal dashboard
- rate-monitor.ts: poll rates, alert on threshold
- orderbook-snapshot.ts: multi-currency orderbook depth
- maker-report.ts: portfolio report for a maker address
- live-activity.ts: real-time protocol event stream
- x402-agent.ts: x402 pay-per-request flow walkthrough

## Links

- API docs: https://peerlytics.xyz/developers
- SDK: https://www.npmjs.com/package/@peerlytics/sdk
- OpenAPI: https://peerlytics.xyz/api/openapi
- LLM context: https://peerlytics.xyz/llms.txt
- Protocol: https://zkp2p.xyz
